mapper.update: update batch.job_partition set partition_status = #{retryingStatus}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, worker_code = null, lease_expire_at = null, current_invocation_id = null, invocation_started_at = null, finished_at = null, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: select * from batch.job_partition where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and partition_status in (#{readyStatus}, #{runningStatus}) and lease_expire_at is not null and lease_expire_at < current_timestamp order by id asc

select * from batch.job_partition where partition_status in (#{readyStatus}, #{runningStatus}) and lease_expire_at is not null and lease_expire_at < current_timestamp order by id asc
limit #{batchSize}
mapper.update:
update batch.job_partition set partition_status = #{readyStatus}, worker_code = null, lease_expire_at = null, current_invocation_id = null, invocation_started_at = null, started_at = null, finished_at = null, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and version = #{expectedVersion}
and (lease_expire_at is null or lease_expire_at < current_timestamp)
mapper.select: select count(1) from batch.job_partition where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and partition_status in (#{readyStatus}, #{runningStatus}, #{retryingStatus})
select count(1) from batch.job_partition where partition_status in (#{readyStatus}, #{runningStatus}) and lease_expire_at is not null and lease_expire_at < current_timestamp
mapper.update: update batch.job_partition set partition_status = #{targetPartitionStatus}, worker_code = null, lease_expire_at = null, current_invocation_id = null, invocation_started_at = null, finished_at = current_timestamp, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and job_instance_id = #{jobInstanceId} and partition_status in ('CREATED', 'WAITING', 'READY', 'RUNNING', 'RETRYING')
